definitions.eim_assignment: CAISO EIM staggered entry by state, 2015-2018.
definitions.event_assignment: Strict 1996/1998/1999 HQ-state hub mapping from firm_event.parquet.
definitions.input_industrial_high: Non-output firm whose top electricity-intensity segment SIC is 1000-3999 and whose max firm-year electricity input intensity is at least 3%.
definitions.input_manufacturing_high: Non-output firm whose top electricity-intensity segment SIC is 2000-3999 and whose max firm-year electricity input intensity is at least 3%.
definitions.input_manufacturing_very_high: Same as input_manufacturing_high but max intensity is at least 6%.
definitions.modern_regional_assignment: PJM RPM 2007, ERCOT nodal 2010, MISO South 2013, and SPP Integrated Marketplace 2014 HQ-state proxies.
definitions.output_producer: Firm ever has an electric-power operating segment in seg_invest2.elec.
